title: Word Bird
description: Fast-paced word categorization game with responsive obstacle spacing. Navigate a bird through colored boxes, picking the odd word out from each column.

title: Glitch Loom
description: Weave pixel-sorted and datamoshed strands into glitch art tapestries with custom patterns and animation exports.

title: Memory Palace Builder
description: 3D interactive spatial memory system using WASD navigation. Place custom objects and practice your recall.

title: Prime Spiral Observatory
description: Explore the mysterious patterns of prime numbers through an interactive spiral visualization.

title: Flock Mind
description: Emergent boids flocking simulation with attract/repel interactions and spatial grid optimization.

title: Branching Narrative Web
description: Navigate complex interactive stories through an interconnected web of branching narrative paths.

title: Sideways Tetris
description: A mind-bending twist on the classic puzzle game where pieces fall horizontally instead of vertically.

title: Wave Collapse Weaver
description: Procedural generation tool using the Wave Function Collapse algorithm to create infinite, repeating patterns.

title: Neural Knot Untangler
description: 3D graph puzzle game. Untangle complex neural knots to clear crossings across varying difficulty levels.

title: Cell Symphony
description: Interactive cellular automaton that generates dynamic musical soundscapes as life evolves on the grid.

title: Echo Weaver
description: A WASM-powered rhythmic node sequencer. Place and connect sound nodes to build music. Rebuilt from scratch with WebAssembly for smooth performance.

title: Elemental Garden
description: Cosmic Garden — combine Stardust, Void, Photon, and Gravity to grow a universe of 40+ stellar and botanical life forms.

title: Lava Flow
description: Mesmerizing fluid dynamics and particle simulation exploring the hypnotic movement of digital lava.

title: Mirror Maze
description: Navigate a tricky labyrinth of reflecting surfaces. Use logic and spatial reasoning to find the exit.

title: Signal Scope
description: Real-time audio analyzer featuring 8 notation formats, pitch history, and visual waveform feedback.

title: Sort Cinema
description: Educational visualization of 15 different sorting algorithms in action, complete with interactive explanations.

title: Neon Synth Pad
description: Expressive, neon-infused synthesizer pad for creating rich electronic soundscapes in your browser.

title: Pendulum Waves
description: Hypnotic physics simulation demonstrating the mathematical beauty of uncoupled pendulum waves.
